Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Enum Class ExternalDataSourceType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ExternalDataSourceType>
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ExternalDataSourceType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExternalDataSourceType>, Constable
public enum ExternalDataSourceType extends Enum<ExternalDataSourceType>

Java class for ExternalDataSourceType

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <simpleType name="ExternalDataSourceType">
   <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string">
     <enumeration value="AmazonAthena"/>
     <enumeration value="AmazonDynamoDb"/>
     <enumeration value="contentHubItem"/>
     <enumeration value="Datacloud"/>
     <enumeration value="Datajourney"/>
     <enumeration value="GraphQl"/>
     <enumeration value="Identity"/>
     <enumeration value="OData"/>
     <enumeration value="OData4"/>
     <enumeration value="OData401"/>
     <enumeration value="OpenSearch"/>
     <enumeration value="outgoingemail"/>
     <enumeration value="QLIAttribute"/>
     <enumeration value="SciApi"/>
     <enumeration value="SelectableEmailAddressView"/>
     <enumeration value="SfdcOrg"/>
     <enumeration value="SimpleURL"/>
     <enumeration value="TrailheadEditWithId"/>
     <enumeration value="usermobileconfig"/>
     <enumeration value="usrconnectionstatus"/>
     <enumeration value="Wrapper"/>
   </restriction>
 </simpleType>
